screens.name: Citizen / Home (Dashboard)
components: Complaints Card (File issues and track complaint status)
screens.notes: Primary landing page for authenticated citizens. Features large descriptive cards for main services.

screens.name: Complaint Filing / Step 1: Type Selection
components: Complaint Category List (Streetlights, Garbage, Drains, etc.)
screens.notes: First step in the complaint filing wizard. Uses a list of descriptive categories.

screens.name: Complaint Filing / Step 2: Sub-type Selection
screens.notes: Refining the complaint category into specific sub-types.

screens.name: Complaint Filing / Step 3: Pin Location
components: Bottom Action Bar (Next, Skip and Continue)
screens.notes: Interactive map step for pinpointing complaint location.

screens.name: Complaint Filing / Step 4: Pincode & Address
components: Bottom Action Bar (Next, Skip and Continue)
screens.notes: Form for manual address input or pincode verification.

screens.name: Complaint Filing / Step 5: Upload Photos
components: Bottom Action Bar (Next, Skip and Continue)

screens.name: Complaint Filing / Step 6: Additional Details
screens.notes: Final step before submission to capture narrative context.

screens.name: Auth / OTP Verification
screens.notes: Standard DIGIT-style OTP verification but with Nairobi branding.

screens.name: Complaint / Success Page
screens.notes: Confirmation screen after successful complaint submission.

screens.name: Citizen / My Complaints
components: Complaint Card (Status Tag, Complaint No., Status Label)
screens.notes: List view for tracking filed complaints.

destructiveReplaces: Delete standard DIGIT LandingPage tiles; replace with vertical Service Card stack (Quick Pay, Complaints) as seen in Android - 106.
Replace standard DIGIT Header with Nairobi-branded version (background: #204F37, white icons/text).
Override default Complaint Filing flow to strictly follow the 6-step wizard identified (Type -> Subtype -> Pin -> Address -> Photos -> Details).
Delete standard DIGIT success screen; replace with the Panel-based green success component (#2E7D32) from Android - 111.
newComponentsNeeded: ServiceCard (Large variant with undraw-style illustrations and #FFF4D6 background)
NairobiSuccessPanel (Centered green panel with large check icon)
